<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ku" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>LA TAZZA CAFE</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Noto+Sans+Arabic:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --nb:#1C4A5C;--nd:#0E2E3C;--nl:#2E6B80;--nm:#1A3E50;
  --g:#E8D4A0;--gd:#C4A35A;--gb:#F2E2B8;--gp:#FAF0DC;
  --sn:0 8px 32px rgba(14,46,60,.5);--sg:0 4px 20px rgba(196,163,90,.3);
  --r:28px;--rp:999px;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;}
body{
  font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;
  background:var(--nd);
  color:var(--g);
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}

/* ═══ ANIMATED BG ═══ */
.bg-canvas{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#091c26 0%,#0e2e3c 40%,#1c4a5c 80%,#142638 100%);
}
.orb{
  position:absolute;border-radius:50%;
  filter:blur(70px);pointer-events:none;
  animation:orbFloat linear infinite;
}
.orb1{width:500px;height:500px;top:-150px;right:-100px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(46,107,128,.35),transparent 70%);
  animation-duration:18s;}
.orb2{width:400px;height:400px;bottom:-100px;left:-80px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(196,163,90,.15),transparent 70%);
  animation-duration:22s;animation-direction:reverse;}
.orb3{width:300px;height:300px;top:40%;left:30%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(46,107,128,.18),transparent 70%);
  animation-duration:15s;}
@keyframes orbFloat{
  0%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);}
  33%{transform:translate(30px,-20px) scale(1.05);}
  66%{transform:translate(-20px,30px) scale(.95);}
  100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);}
}

/* ═══ APP SHELL ═══ */
.app{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  height:100vh;height:100dvh;
  max-width:430px;margin:0 auto;
  background:rgba(14,46,60,.55);
  backdrop-filter:blur(2px);
  overflow:hidden;
}

/* ═══ HEADER ═══ */
.hdr{
  flex-shrink:0;
  padding:10px 14px 8px;
  background:rgba(9,28,38,.7);
  backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(200%);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.13);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;
}
.hdr-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;min-width:0;}
.logo-wrap{
  position:relative;width:46px;height:46px;flex-shrink:0;
  border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;
  border:1.5px solid rgba(232,212,160,.35);
  box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(196,163,90,.25);
}
.logo-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.brand-text{min-width:0;}
.brand-name{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:17px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.15em;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;
}
.brand-sub{
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.4);text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-top:-1px;
}
.hdr-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;align-items:flex-end;flex-shrink:0;}

/* Lang switcher */
.lang-sw{
  display:flex;gap:2px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  border-radius:var(--rp);padding:2px;
}
.lb{
  padding:4px 9px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.05em;
  transition:all .25s ease;background:transparent;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.4);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.lb.on{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  color:var(--nd);
}
.lb:hover:not(.on){color:var(--g);background:rgba(232,212,160,.08);}

/* Nav tabs */
.nav-tabs{
  display:flex;gap:2px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  border-radius:var(--rp);padding:2px;
}
.tb{
  padding:6px 13px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:500;
  transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  background:transparent;color:rgba(232,212,160,.45);
  font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.tb.on{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--nl),var(--nm));
  color:var(--gb);
  box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(46,107,128,.4);
}
.tb:hover:not(.on){color:var(--g);background:rgba(232,212,160,.06);}

/* ═══ VIEWS ═══ */
.views{flex:1;overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.view{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  scrollbar-width:thin;
  scrollbar-color:rgba(232,212,160,.12) transparent;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transform:translateY(12px);
  transition:opacity .3s ease,transform .3s ease;
}
.view::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.view::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(232,212,160,.12);border-radius:2px;}
.view.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;transform:translateY(0);}

/* ═══ MENU VIEW ═══ */
.mv-wrap{padding:16px 14px 24px;}
.mv-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;}
.mv-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:24px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.04em;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.mv-count{font-size:11px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.35);letter-spacing:.15em;margin-top:1px;}

/* Cat bar */
.cat-bar{
  display:flex;gap:7px;overflow-x:auto;
  padding-bottom:2px;margin-bottom:16px;
  scrollbar-width:none;
}
.cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.cc{
  flex-shrink:0;padding:6px 14px;
  border-radius:var(--rp);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.15);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.45);
  font-size:12px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .22s ease;
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic','Inter',sans-serif;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.cc.on{
  background:rgba(46,107,128,.45);
  border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.4);
  color:var(--gb);
  box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(46,107,128,.3);
}
.cc:hover:not(.on){border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.28);color:var(--g);}

/* Menu grid */
.mg{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
  gap:12px;
}
.mc{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.12);
  border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  position:relative;
  animation:fadeUp .4s ease both;
}
.mc::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,212,160,.06),transparent 55%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.mc:hover{
  transform:translateY(-3px);
  border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.3);
  box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(9,28,38,.55),var(--sg);
}
.mc:active{transform:scale(.97);}
.mc-img{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(14,46,60,.8),rgba(28,74,92,.6));
  overflow:hidden;position:relative;
}
.mc-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s ease;}
.mc:hover .mc-img img{transform:scale(1.07);}
.mc-ph{
  width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;font-size:32px;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.15);
}
.mc-add{
  position:absolute;bottom:8px;right:8px;
  width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  border:none;cursor:pointer;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(196,163,90,.4);
  opacity:0;transform:scale(.6);
  transition:all .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);z-index:2;
}
.mc:hover .mc-add{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}
.mc-add svg{width:13px;height:13px;color:var(--nd);}
.mc-body{padding:10px 12px 12px;}
.mc-cat{
  display:inline-block;margin-bottom:5px;
  padding:2px 8px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:rgba(46,107,128,.25);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.12);
  font-size:9px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.45);
  text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  direction:ltr;letter-spacing:.08em;
}
.mc-name{
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic','Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gb);
  line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:5px;
}
.mc-price{font-size:11px;direction:ltr;text-align:left;}
.mc-price-n{
  font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}

/* Empty */
.empty{
  grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;
}
.empty-ic{
  width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(232,212,160,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.09);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin:0 auto 18px;
}
.empty-ic svg{width:34px;height:34px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.18);}
.empty h3{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:20px;font-weight:300;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.45);margin-bottom:7px;
}
.empty p{font-size:12px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.28);line-height:1.6;}
.go-adm{
  margin-top:18px;
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  padding:10px 22px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--nl),var(--nm));
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.18);
  color:var(--g);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .22s ease;
  text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.go-adm:hover{box-shadow:var(--sn);transform:translateY(-1px);}

/* ═══ POS VIEW ═══ */
.pv{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;}

/* POS top - items */
.pv-items{
  flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;
  padding:14px 12px 8px;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  scrollbar-width:none;
}
.pv-items::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.pv-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;}
.pv-title-lbl{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:18px;font-weight:300;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.pg{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:9px;
}
.pc{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.pc:hover{border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.3);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.pc:active{transform:scale(.94);background:rgba(232,212,160,.08);}
.pc.added{animation:pcPulse .3s ease;}
@keyframes pcPulse{0%{transform:scale(1);}50%{transform:scale(.92);border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.55);}100%{transform:scale(1);}}
.pc-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(14,46,60,.7),rgba(28,74,92,.5));overflow:hidden;}
.pc-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.pc-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.15);}
.pc-info{padding:6px 8px 8px;}
.pc-name{
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--g);line-height:1.2;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;
}
.pc-price{
  font-size:10px;font-weight:600;direction:ltr;text-align:left;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}

/* Cart bottom sheet */
.cart-sheet{
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:rgba(9,28,38,.92);
  backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(180%);
  border-top:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.13);
  border-radius:22px 22px 0 0;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  max-height:52vh;
  transition:max-height .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.cart-sheet.expanded{max-height:72vh;}

/* Cart drag handle */
.cart-handle{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:10px 16px 8px;cursor:pointer;
}
.cart-pill{
  width:36px;height:4px;border-radius:2px;
  background:rgba(232,212,160,.2);
  position:absolute;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
}
.cart-header-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 16px;
}
.cart-title-lbl{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:17px;font-weight:400;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.cart-badge{
  min-width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:11px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  color:var(--nd);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:0 6px;
}
.cart-clr{
  font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.3);text-transform:uppercase;
  cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;padding:4px 6px;
}
.cart-clr:hover{color:rgba(220,90,90,.7);}

/* Order meta */
.cart-meta{
  display:flex;gap:7px;padding:6px 14px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.06);
}
.of{
  flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  border-radius:10px;padding:6px 10px;
}
.of label{
  display:block;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:2px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.of input,.of select{
  width:100%;background:none;border:none;
  color:var(--g);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;outline:none;
}
.of select option{background:var(--nd);}

/* Cart items list */
.cart-list{
  flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;
  padding:6px 14px;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  scrollbar-width:thin;
  scrollbar-color:rgba(232,212,160,.08) transparent;
}
.cart-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.cart-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(232,212,160,.1);}

.cart-empty-msg{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:20px 10px;gap:8px;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.2);text-align:center;
}
.cart-empty-msg svg{width:36px;height:36px;opacity:.2;}
.cart-empty-msg p{font-size:12px;}

.ci{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
  padding:7px 0;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.05);
  animation:slideIn .22s ease;
}
@keyframes slideIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(8px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}}
.ci-img{
  width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:8px;
  background:rgba(28,74,92,.4);flex-shrink:0;
  overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.08);
}
.ci-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ci-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.15);}
.ci-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.ci-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--g);font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;
  white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.ci-price{font-size:10px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.45);direction:ltr;text-align:left;margin-top:1px;}
.qty-ctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-shrink:0;}
.qb{
  width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(232,212,160,.07);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.13);
  color:var(--g);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:all .18s ease;line-height:1;
}
.qb:hover{background:rgba(232,212,160,.18);border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);}
.qv{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gb);min-width:16px;text-align:center;}

/* Cart footer */
.cart-footer{
  padding:10px 14px 14px;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.08);
}
.cart-total-row{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  margin-bottom:10px;direction:ltr;
}
.cart-total-lbl{font-size:12px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.5);}
.cart-total-val{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.chk-btn{
  width:100%;padding:14px;
  border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd) 0%,var(--gb) 50%,var(--gd) 100%);
  background-size:200% auto;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--nd);letter-spacing:.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:all .35s ease;
  box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(196,163,90,.35);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.chk-btn::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.2),transparent);
  transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .5s ease;
}
.chk-btn:hover{background-position:right center;box-shadow:0 5px 26px rgba(196,163,90,.5);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.chk-btn:hover::after{transform:translateX(100%);}
.chk-btn:active{transform:scale(.98);}
.chk-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;}

/* ═══ ADMIN VIEW ═══ */
.av-wrap{padding:14px 14px 32px;}
.av-hdr{margin-bottom:20px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.09);}
.av-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:300;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  letter-spacing:.04em;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.av-sub{font-size:12px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);letter-spacing:.04em;}

/* Stats */
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;}
.sc{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.09);
  border-radius:14px;padding:12px 14px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.sc::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,212,160,.04),transparent 60%);}
.sc-lbl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:rgba(232,212,160,.32);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}
.sc-val{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:26px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}

/* Add form */
.af{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.12);
  border-radius:var(--r);padding:20px;
  margin-bottom:22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.af::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gd),var(--gb),var(--gd),transparent);
}
.af-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:17px;
  color:var(--gb);margin-bottom:18px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.af-title svg{width:16px;height:16px;color:var(--gd);}
.fg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.ff{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.ff.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.fl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:rgba(232,212,160,.4);text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}
.fi{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.12);
  border-radius:10px;padding:10px 13px;
  color:var(--g);font-size:14px;
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic','Inter',sans-serif;
  outline:none;transition:all .22s ease;width:100%;
}
.fi::placeholder{color:rgba(232,212,160,.18);}
.fi:focus{border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(232,212,160,.05);}
.fi.ltr{direction:ltr;text-align:left;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}

/* Upload zone */
.uz{
  border:2px dashed rgba(232,212,160,.16);
  border-radius:12px;aspect-ratio:16/9;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  gap:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .28s ease;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.uz:hover{border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);background:rgba(232,212,160,.04);}
.uz.hi{border-style:solid;border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.22);}
.uz img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px;}
.uz-ov{
  position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(9,28,38,.72);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  gap:5px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .22s;border-radius:10px;
}
.uz.hi:hover .uz-ov{opacity:1;}
.uz-txt{font-size:11px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;}
.uz-hint{font-size:10px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.2);}
.img-in{display:none;}

/* Cat suggestions */
.cs-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;}
.cs{
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);font-size:10px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s;
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic','Inter',sans-serif;
}
.cs:hover{border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.28);color:var(--g);}

/* Form buttons */
.fs{margin-top:4px;display:flex;gap:8px;}
.bp{
  flex:1;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--nl),var(--nm));
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.2);
  color:var(--gb);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .22s ease;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.bp:hover{box-shadow:var(--sn);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.bg{
  padding:12px 24px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  border:none;color:var(--nd);
  font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .22s ease;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  box-shadow:var(--sg);
}
.bg:hover{box-shadow:0 5px 24px rgba(196,163,90,.5);transform:translateY(-1px);}

/* Items list */
.il-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.il-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--gb);}
.il-badge{
  padding:2px 10px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:rgba(46,107,128,.2);
  border:1px solid rgba(46,107,128,.28);
  font-size:11px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.55);
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.ai{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.09);
  border-radius:13px;padding:12px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  transition:all .22s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  animation:fadeUp .35s ease both;
}
.ai::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .22s;
}
.ai:hover{border-color:rgba(232,212,160,.18);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);}
.ai:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.ai-img{
  width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:10px;
  background:rgba(28,74,92,.4);flex-shrink:0;
  overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.08);
}
.ai-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ai-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.12);}
.ai-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.ai-name{
  font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--g);
  text-align:right;margin-bottom:3px;
}
.ai-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;}
.ai-price{
  font-size:12px;font-weight:600;direction:ltr;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.ai-cat{
  padding:1px 8px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:rgba(46,107,128,.18);
  border:1px solid rgba(46,107,128,.22);
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.08em;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.4);text-transform:uppercase;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.ai-del{
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px;
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:all .18s ease;color:rgba(232,212,160,.35);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ai-del:hover{background:rgba(220,80,80,.12);border-color:rgba(220,80,80,.3);color:rgba(220,100,100,.8);}
.ai-del svg{width:13px;height:13px;}
.no-items{text-align:center;padding:32px 16px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.22);font-size:13px;}

/* ═══ MODAL ═══ */
.mo{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;
  background:rgba(9,28,38,.85);
  backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;
  padding:0;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .3s ease;
}
.mo.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.md{
  background:linear-gradient(170deg,rgba(26,58,76,.97),rgba(14,38,52,.99));
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.18);
  border-radius:26px 26px 0 0;
  padding:0 22px 32px;
  width:100%;max-width:430px;
  box-shadow:0 -20px 60px rgba(9,28,38,.7);
  transform:translateY(100%);
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;
}
.mo.open .md{transform:translateY(0);}
.md::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gd),var(--gb),var(--gd),transparent);
}
.md-pill{
  width:40px;height:4px;border-radius:2px;
  background:rgba(232,212,160,.2);
  margin:12px auto 20px;
}
.md-logo{text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px;}
.md-logo-img{
  width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;
  overflow:hidden;
  border:2px solid rgba(232,212,160,.28);
  box-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(196,163,90,.2);
  margin:0 auto 10px;
}
.md-logo-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.md-brand{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:16px;
  letter-spacing:.22em;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}
.md-sub{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.32em;color:rgba(232,212,160,.28);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;}
.rd{border:none;border-top:1px dashed rgba(232,212,160,.13);margin:12px 0;}
.ri{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);margin-bottom:3px;direction:ltr;}
.ritem{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.05);
  font-size:12px;direction:ltr;
}
.ritem-name{color:var(--g);font-family:'Noto Sans Arabic',sans-serif;flex:1;text-align:right;margin-left:7px;}
.ritem-qty{color:rgba(232,212,160,.38);font-size:10px;min-width:24px;}
.ritem-price{color:var(--gd);font-weight:500;min-width:70px;text-align:right;}
.rtotal{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:9px;margin-top:3px;direction:ltr;}
.rtotal-lbl{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gb);}
.rtotal-val{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:20px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gb),var(--gd));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.rfooter{
  text-align:center;margin-top:14px;
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:12px;
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.28);font-style:italic;letter-spacing:.1em;
}
.ma{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;}
.m-cls{
  flex:1;padding:12px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.13);
  color:rgba(232,212,160,.55);font-size:13px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
.m-cls:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.m-new{
  flex:2;padding:12px;border-radius:var(--rp);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gd),var(--gb));
  border:none;color:var(--nd);
  font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .22s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  letter-spacing:.05em;
}
.m-new:hover{box-shadow:var(--sg);transform:translateY(-1px);}

/* ═══ TOAST ═══ */
.toast{
  position:fixed;bottom:20px;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(60px);
  background:rgba(26,58,76,.97);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,212,160,.18);
  border-radius:var(--rp);padding:10px 20px;
  font-size:12px;color:var(--g);
  backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  box-shadow:var(--sn);z-index:2000;
  transition:transform .32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  white-space:nowrap;max-width:90vw;text-align:center;
}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}

@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg-canvas">
  <div class="orb orb1"></div>
  <div class="orb orb2"></div>
  <div class="orb orb3"></div>
</div>

<div class="app">
  <!-- HEADER -->
  <header class="hdr">
    <div class="hdr-brand">
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="La Tazza">
      </div>
      <div class="brand-text">
        <div class="brand-name">La Tazza</div>
        <div class="brand-sub" id="hdr-sub">Kafê</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hdr-right">
      <div class="lang-sw">
        <button class="lb" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
        <button class="lb" onclick="setLang('ar')">ع</button>
        <button class="lb" onclick="setLang('sor')">سۆر</button>
        <button class="lb on" onclick="setLang('kmr')">کرم</button>
      </div>
      <div class="nav-tabs">
        <button class="tb on" id="tab-menu" onclick="sw('menu')">Menû</button>
        <button class="tb" id="tab-pos" onclick="sw('pos')">Firotanê</button>
        <button class="tb" id="tab-admin" onclick="sw('admin')">Rêvebirin</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- VIEWS -->
  <div class="views">
    <!-- MENU VIEW -->
    <div class="view on" id="view-menu">
      <div class="mv-wrap">
        <div class="mv-header">
          <div>
            <div class="mv-title" id="mv-title">Menûya Me</div>
            <div class="mv-count" id="mv-count">0 tişt</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-bar" id="menu-cats"></div>
        <div class="mg" id="menu-grid"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- POS VIEW -->
    <div class="view" id="view-pos">
      <div class="pv">
        <div class="pv-items">
          <div class="pv-top">
            <div class="pv-title-lbl" id="pos-title">Siparîş</div>
            <div class="cat-bar" id="pos-cats" style="margin:0;flex:1;justify-content:flex-end;"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pg" id="pos-grid"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cart-sheet" id="cart-sheet">
          <div class="cart-handle" onclick="toggleCart()">
            <div style="position:relative;width:100%;height:4px;">
              <div class="cart-pill"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="cart-header-row">
            <div class="cart-title-lbl" id="cart-title-lbl">Siparîş</div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <div class="cart-badge" id="cart-badge">0</div>
              <button class="cart-clr" id="cart-clr-btn" onclick="clearCart()">Paqij</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="cart-meta">
            <div class="of">
              <label id="lbl-table">Mase</label>
              <input id="tableNum" type="text" placeholder="1">
            </div>
            <div class="of">
              <label id="lbl-type">Cure</label>
              <select id="orderType">
                <option value="dine-in" id="opt-di">Li Vir Bixwe</option>
                <option value="takeaway" id="opt-ta">Bibire Malê</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="cart-list" id="cart-list"></div>
          <div class="cart-footer">
            <div class="cart-total-row">
              <span class="cart-total-lbl" id="lbl-total">Giştî</span>
              <span class="cart-total-val" id="total-val">0 IQD</span>
            </div>
            <button class="chk-btn" id="chk-btn" onclick="checkout()" disabled>Bitenê</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ADMIN VIEW -->
    <div class="view" id="view-admin">
      <div class="av-wrap">
        <div class="av-hdr">
          <div class="av-title" id="av-title">Birêvebirina Menûyê</div>
          <div class="av-sub" id="av-sub">Tiştan zêde bike, biguherîne, an jê bibe</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stats">
          <div class="sc"><div class="sc-lbl" id="sl-items">Tiştên</div><div class="sc-val" id="st-items">0</div></div>
          <div class="sc"><div class="sc-lbl" id="sl-cats">Kategorî</div><div class="sc-val" id="st-cats">0</div></div>
          <div class="sc"><div class="sc-lbl" id="sl-orders">Siparîş</div><div class="sc-val" id="st-orders">0</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="af">
          <div class="af-title">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14m-7-7h14"/></svg>
            <span id="af-title-lbl">Tiştek Nû Zêde Bike</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <div class="ff full">
              <label class="fl" id="lbl-photo">Wêneya Tiştî</label>
              <div class="uz" id="uz" onclick="document.getElementById('img-in').click()">
                <div class="uz-ov">
                  <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="rgba(232,212,160,.6)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
                  <span id="lbl-chg-ph" style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.6);">Wêne Biguherîne</span>
                </div>
                <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="rgba(232,212,160,.25)" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="3"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"/></svg>
                <div class="uz-txt" id="lbl-up-ph">Wêne Bar Bike</div>
                <div class="uz-hint" id="lbl-up-hint">Ji galeriyek hilbijêre</div>
              </div>
              <input type="file" id="img-in" class="img-in" accept="image/*" onchange="handleImg(this)">
            </div>
            <div class="ff full">
              <label class="fl" id="lbl-iname">Navê Tiştî</label>
              <input type="text" id="iname" class="fi" dir="rtl" placeholder="Navê tiştî binivîse...">
            </div>
            <div class="ff">
              <label class="fl" id="lbl-iprice">Bihayê (IQD)</label>
              <input type="number" id="iprice" class="fi ltr" placeholder="0" min="0" step="500">
            </div>
            <div class="ff">
              <label class="fl" id="lbl-icat">Kategorî</label>
              <input type="text" id="icat" class="fi" dir="rtl" placeholder="...">
              <div class="cs-row" id="cs-row"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fs">
            <button class="bp" id="btn-rst" onclick="resetForm()">Sifir</button>
            <button class="bg" id="btn-add" onclick="addItem()">Zêde Bike</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="il-hdr">
            <div class="il-title" id="il-title">Tiştên Menûyê</div>
            <div class="il-badge" id="il-badge">0 tişt</div>
          </div>
          <div id="items-list"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECEIPT MODAL -->
<div class="mo" id="mo">
  <div class="md">
    <div class="md-pill"></div>
    <div class="md-logo">
      <div class="md-logo-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="La Tazza"></div>
      <div class="md-brand">La Tazza</div>
      <div class="md-sub" id="md-sub">Kafê</div>
    </div>
    <hr class="rd">
    <div class="ri">
      <span id="r-date"></span>
      <span id="r-info"></span>
    </div>
    <hr class="rd">
    <div id="r-items"></div>
    <hr class="rd">
    <div class="rtotal">
      <span class="rtotal-lbl" id="r-total-lbl">Giştî</span>
      <span class="rtotal-val" id="r-total"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="rfooter" id="r-footer">Spas ji bo serdana La Tazza Kafê ☕</div>
    <div class="ma">
      <button class="m-cls" id="m-cls" onclick="closeMo()">Bigire</button>
      <button class="m-new" id="m-new" onclick="newOrder()">Siparîşeke Nû</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
// ── TRANSLATIONS ──
const T={
  en:{dir:'ltr',tabMenu:'Menu',tabPos:'POS',tabAdmin:'Admin',hdrSub:'Cafe',
    mvTitle:'Our Menu',mvCount:'items',catAll:'All',
    emptyTitle:'No items yet',emptyMsg:'Go to Admin to add items.',emptyBtn:'Add Item',
    posTitle:'Order',cartTitle:'Order',cartClr:'Clear',
    lblTable:'Table',lblType:'Type',optDi:'Dine In',optTa:'Takeaway',
    cartEmptyMsg:'Tap items to add',lblTotal:'Total',chkBtn:'Checkout',
    avTitle:'Menu Management',avSub:'Add, edit or remove items',
    slItems:'Items',slCats:'Categories',slOrders:'Today',
    afTitle:'Add New Item',lblPhoto:'Item Photo',lblChgPh:'Change Photo',
    lblUpPh:'Upload Photo',lblUpHint:'Tap to choose from gallery',
    lblIname:'Item Name',inamePh:'Type item name...',
    lblIprice:'Price (IQD)',lblIcat:'Category',icatPh:'Category...',
    cats:['Coffee ☕','Tea 🍵','Juice 🥤','Cake 🍰','Food 🍽','Special ⭐'],
    catV:['Coffee','Tea','Juice','Cake','Food','Special'],
    btnRst:'Reset',btnAdd:'Add to Menu',
    ilTitle:'Menu Items',ilSuffix:'items',
    mdSub:'Cafe',rFooter:'Thank you for visiting La Tazza Cafe ☕',
    rTotalLbl:'Total',mCls:'Close',mNew:'New Order',
    tAdded:'— added',tDel:'Deleted',tOrder:'Order complete!',
    tNoName:'Please enter item name',tNoPrice:'Please enter valid price',
    diLbl:'Table',taLbl:'Takeaway',
    noItemsAdmin:'No items yet. Add your first item above.',
    noItemsCat:'No items in this category.',
  },
  ar:{dir:'rtl',tabMenu:'القائمة',tabPos:'المبيعات',tabAdmin:'الإدارة',hdrSub:'كافيه',
    mvTitle:'قائمتنا',mvCount:'عناصر',catAll:'الكل',
    emptyTitle:'لا توجد عناصر',emptyMsg:'اذهب للإدارة لإضافة عناصر.',emptyBtn:'أضف عنصراً',
    posTitle:'الطلب',cartTitle:'الطلب',cartClr:'مسح',
    lblTable:'الطاولة',lblType:'النوع',optDi:'تناول هنا',optTa:'خارجي',
    cartEmptyMsg:'اضغط لإضافة عناصر',lblTotal:'الإجمالي',chkBtn:'إتمام الطلب',
    avTitle:'إدارة القائمة',avSub:'أضف أو عدّل أو احذف عناصر القائمة',
    slItems:'العناصر',slCats:'الفئات',slOrders:'اليوم',
    afTitle:'إضافة عنصر جديد',lblPhoto:'صورة العنصر',lblChgPh:'تغيير الصورة',
    lblUpPh:'رفع صورة',lblUpHint:'اضغط لاختيار من المعرض',
    lblIname:'اسم العنصر',inamePh:'اكتب اسم العنصر...',
    lblIprice:'السعر (د.ع)',lblIcat:'الفئة',icatPh:'الفئة...',
    cats:['قهوة ☕','شاي 🍵','عصير 🥤','كيك 🍰','طعام 🍽','مميز ⭐'],
    catV:['قهوة','شاي','عصير','كيك','طعام','مميز'],
    btnRst:'إعادة',btnAdd:'أضف للقائمة',
    ilTitle:'عناصر القائمة',ilSuffix:'عناصر',
    mdSub:'كافيه',rFooter:'شكراً لزيارة لا تازا كافيه ☕',
    rTotalLbl:'الإجمالي',mCls:'إغلاق',mNew:'طلب جديد',
    tAdded:'— تمت الإضافة',tDel:'تم الحذف',tOrder:'اكتمل الطلب!',
    tNoName:'أدخل اسم العنصر',tNoPrice:'أدخل سعراً صحيحاً',
    diLbl:'طاولة',taLbl:'خارجي',
    noItemsAdmin:'لا توجد عناصر. أضف أول عنصر أعلاه.',
    noItemsCat:'لا توجد عناصر في هذه الفئة.',
  },
  sor:{dir:'rtl',tabMenu:'مێنیو',tabPos:'فرۆشتن',tabAdmin:'بەڕێوەبردن',hdrSub:'کافێ',
    mvTitle:'مێنیوی ئێمە',mvCount:'ئایتەم',catAll:'هەمووی',
    emptyTitle:'هێشتا ئایتەمێک نییە',emptyMsg:'بڕۆ بەڕێوەبردن بۆ زیادکردن.',emptyBtn:'زیادکردن',
    posTitle:'داواکاری',cartTitle:'داواکاری',cartClr:'پاکردنەوە',
    lblTable:'مێز',lblType:'جۆر',optDi:'لێرە بخۆ',optTa:'ببە بۆ ماڵ',
    cartEmptyMsg:'ئایتەمەکان دەسنیشان بکە',lblTotal:'کۆی گشتی',chkBtn:'تەواوکردن',
    avTitle:'بەڕێوەبردنی مێنیو',avSub:'ئایتەم زیاد بکە یان بیسڕەوە',
    slItems:'ئایتەم',slCats:'جۆرەکان',slOrders:'ئەمڕۆ',
    afTitle:'زیادکردنی ئایتەمی نوێ',lblPhoto:'وێنەی ئایتەم',lblChgPh:'گۆڕینی وێنە',
    lblUpPh:'بارکردنی وێنە',lblUpHint:'بتەکە بۆ هەڵبژاردن',
    lblIname:'ناوی ئایتەم',inamePh:'ناوی ئایتەم بنووسە...',
    lblIprice:'نرخ (د.ع)',lblIcat:'جۆر',icatPh:'جۆرەکە...',
    cats:['قاوە ☕','چای 🍵','شەربەت 🥤','کێک 🍰','خواردن 🍽','تایبەت ⭐'],
    catV:['قاوە','چای','شەربەت','کێک','خواردن','تایبەت'],
    btnRst:'سفرکردنەوە',btnAdd:'زیادکردن',
    ilTitle:'ئایتەمەکانی مێنیو',ilSuffix:'ئایتەم',
    mdSub:'کافێ',rFooter:'سوپاس بۆ سەردانی لا تازا کافێ ☕',
    rTotalLbl:'کۆی گشتی',mCls:'داخستن',mNew:'داواکاری نوێ',
    tAdded:'— زیادکرا',tDel:'سڕایەوە',tOrder:'داواکاری تەواو بوو!',
    tNoName:'ناوی ئایتەم بنووسە',tNoPrice:'نرخی دروست بنووسە',
    diLbl:'مێز',taLbl:'ببە بۆ ماڵ',
    noItemsAdmin:'هێشتا ئایتەمێک نییە. لە سەرەوە زیاد بکە.',
    noItemsCat:'هیچ ئایتەمێک لەم جۆرەدا نییە.',
  },
  kmr:{dir:'rtl',tabMenu:'Menû',tabPos:'Firotanê',tabAdmin:'Rêvebirin',hdrSub:'Kafê',
    mvTitle:'Menûya Me',mvCount:'tişt',catAll:'Hemû',
    emptyTitle:'Hîn tiştek tune',emptyMsg:'Biçe Rêvebiriyê û tiştan zêde bike.',emptyBtn:'Tiştek Zêde Bike',
    posTitle:'Siparîş',cartTitle:'Siparîş',cartClr:'Paqij',
    lblTable:'Mase',lblType:'Cure',optDi:'Li Vir Bixwe',optTa:'Bibire Malê',
    cartEmptyMsg:'Tiştên dixwazî hilbijêre',lblTotal:'Giştî',chkBtn:'Bitenê',
    avTitle:'Birêvebirina Menûyê',avSub:'Tiştan zêde bike, biguherîne, an jê bibe',
    slItems:'Tişt',slCats:'Kategorî',slOrders:'Îro',
    afTitle:'Tiştek Nû Zêde Bike',lblPhoto:'Wêneya Tiştî',lblChgPh:'Wêne Biguherîne',
    lblUpPh:'Wêne Bar Bike',lblUpHint:'Ji galeriyek hilbijêre',
    lblIname:'Navê Tiştî',inamePh:'Navê tiştî binivîse...',
    lblIprice:'Bihayê (IQD)',lblIcat:'Kategorî',icatPh:'Kategoriyê...',
    cats:['Qehwe ☕','Çay 🍵','Şerbet 🥤','Kêk 🍰','Xwarin 🍽','Taybet ⭐'],
    catV:['Qehwe','Çay','Şerbet','Kêk','Xwarin','Taybet'],
    btnRst:'Sifir',btnAdd:'Zêde Bike',
    ilTitle:'Tiştên Menûyê',ilSuffix:'tişt',
    mdSub:'Kafê',rFooter:'Spas ji bo serdana La Tazza Kafê ☕',
    rTotalLbl:'Giştî',mCls:'Bigire',mNew:'Siparîşeke Nû',
    tAdded:'— hat zêdekirin',tDel:'Hat jêbirin',tOrder:'Siparîş temam bû!',
    tNoName:'Navê tiştî binivîse',tNoPrice:'Bihayekî rast binivîse',
    diLbl:'Mase',taLbl:'Bibire Malê',
    noItemsAdmin:'Hîn tiştek tune. Yekem tiştê xwe li jorê zêde bike.',
    noItemsCat:'Di vê kategoriyê de tiştek tune.',
  }
};

// ── STATE ──
let lang=localStorage.getItem('lt_lang')||'kmr';
let items=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lt_items')||'[]');
let cart=[];
let imgData=null;
let mCat='all',pCat='all';
let orders=parseInt(localStorage.getItem('lt_ord')||'0');
const today=new Date().toDateString();
if(localStorage.getItem('lt_today')!==today){orders=0;localStorage.setItem('lt_ord','0');localStorage.setItem('lt_today',today);}

function t(){return T[lang];}
function fp(n){return Number(n).toLocaleString()+' IQD';}
function toast(msg,d=2200){const el=document.getElementById('toast');el.textContent=msg;el.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'),d);}
function save(){localStorage.setItem('lt_items',JSON.stringify(items));}
function cats(arr){return[...new Set(arr.map(i=>i.category))];}

// ── LANG ──
function setLang(l){
  lang=l;localStorage.setItem('lt_lang',l);
  document.querySelectorAll('.lb').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  const map={en:'EN',ar:'ع',sor:'سۆر',kmr:'کرم'};
  document.querySelectorAll('.lb').forEach(b=>{if(b.textContent.trim()===map[l])b.classList.add('on');});
  const x=t();
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('dir',x.dir);
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('lang',x.lang||'ku');
  set('hdr-sub',x.hdrSub);
  set('tab-menu',x.tabMenu);set('tab-pos',x.tabPos);set('tab-admin',x.tabAdmin);
  set('mv-title',x.mvTitle);
  set('pos-title',x.posTitle);
  set('cart-title-lbl',x.cartTitle);
  set('cart-clr-btn',x.cartClr);
  set('lbl-table',x.lblTable);set('lbl-type',x.lblType);
  set('opt-di',x.optDi);set('opt-ta',x.optTa);
  set('lbl-total',x.lblTotal);
  set('chk-btn',document.getElementById('chk-btn').disabled?x.chkBtn:x.chkBtn);
  document.getElementById('chk-btn').textContent=x.chkBtn;
  set('av-title',x.avTitle);set('av-sub',x.avSub);
  set('sl-items',x.slItems);set('sl-cats',x.slCats);set('sl-orders',x.slOrders);
  set('af-title-lbl',x.afTitle);
  set('lbl-photo',x.lblPhoto);set('lbl-chg-ph',x.lblChgPh);
  set('lbl-up-ph',x.lblUpPh);set('lbl-up-hint',x.lblUpHint);
  set('lbl-iname',x.lblIname);document.getElementById('iname').placeholder=x.inamePh;
  set('lbl-iprice',x.lblIprice);
  set('lbl-icat',x.lblIcat);document.getElementById('icat').placeholder=x.icatPh;
  set('btn-rst',x.btnRst);set('btn-add',x.btnAdd);
  set('il-title',x.ilTitle);
  set('md-sub',x.mdSub);set('r-footer',x.rFooter);
  set('r-total-lbl',x.rTotalLbl);set('m-cls',x.mCls);set('m-new',x.mNew);
  // cat suggestions
  const cr=document.getElementById('cs-row');
  cr.innerHTML=x.cats.map((c,i)=>`<span class="cs" onclick="setCat('${x.catV[i]}')">${c}</span>`).join('');
  renderAll();
}
function set(id,val){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=val;}

// ── TABS ──
function sw(tab){
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v=>v.classList.remove('on'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tb').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  document.getElementById('view-'+tab).classList.add('on');
  document.getElementById('tab-'+tab).classList.add('on');
  if(tab==='menu')renderMenu();
  if(tab==='pos')renderPOS();
  if(tab==='admin')renderAdmin();
}

// ── IMAGE ──
function handleImg(inp){
  const f=inp.files[0];if(!f)return;
  const r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=e=>{
    imgData=e.target.result;
    const uz=document.getElementById('uz');
    uz.classList.add('hi');
    const ex=uz.querySelector('img');if(ex)ex.remove();
    const img=document.createElement('img');img.src=imgData;
    uz.insertBefore(img,uz.firstChild);
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(f);
}
function setCat(c){document.getElementById('icat').value=c;}

// ── ADD ITEM ──
function addItem(){
  const x=t();
  const name=document.getElementById('iname').value.trim();
  const price=parseFloat(document.getElementById('iprice').value);
  const cat=document.getElementById('icat').value.trim()||'General';
  if(!name){toast('⚠ '+x.tNoName);return;}
  if(!price||price<=0){toast('⚠ '+x.tNoPrice);return;}
  items.unshift({id:Date.now(),name,price,category:cat,image:imgData||null});
  save();resetForm();renderAdmin();updateStats();
  toast('✓ '+name+' '+x.tAdded);
}
function resetForm(){
  document.getElementById('iname').value='';
  document.getElementById('iprice').value='';
  document.getElementById('icat').value='';
  imgData=null;
  const uz=document.getElementById('uz');
  uz.classList.remove('hi');
  const ex=uz.querySelector('img');if(ex)ex.remove();
  document.getElementById('img-in').value='';
}
function delItem(id){
  items=items.filter(i=>i.id!==id);save();
  renderAdmin();renderMenu();renderPOS();updateStats();
  toast('🗑 '+t().tDel);
}

// ── MENU ──
function renderMenu(){
  const x=t();
  const grid=document.getElementById('menu-grid');
  const cbar=document.getElementById('menu-cats');
  const filtered=mCat==='all'?items:items.filter(i=>i.category===mCat);
  document.getElementById('mv-count').textContent=items.length+' '+x.mvCount;
  const cs=cats(items);
  cbar.innerHTML=`<button class="cc ${mCat==='all'?'on':''}" onclick="fmcat('all',this)">${x.catAll}</button>`;
  cs.forEach(c=>{
    const b=document.createElement('button');
    b.className='cc'+(mCat===c?' on':'');b.textContent=c;
    b.onclick=function(){fmcat(c,this);};cbar.appendChild(b);
  });
  if(!filtered.length){
    grid.innerHTML=`<div class="empty">
      <div class="empty-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M12 6v6m0 0v6m0-6h6m-6 0H6"/></svg></div>
      <h3>${items.length===0?x.emptyTitle:x.noItemsCat}</h3>
      <p>${items.length===0?x.emptyMsg:''}</p>
      ${items.length===0?`<button class="go-adm" onclick="sw('admin')">${x.emptyBtn}</button>`:''}
    </div>`;return;
  }
  grid.innerHTML=filtered.map((item,i)=>`
    <div class="mc" style="animation-delay:${i*.05}s">
      <div class="mc-img">
        ${item.image?`<img src="${item.image}" alt="" loading="lazy">`:`<div class="mc-ph">☕</div>`}
        <button class="mc-add" onclick="addCart(${item.id},event)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 5v14m-7-7h14"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="mc-body">
        <div class="mc-cat">${item.category}</div>
        <div class="mc-name">${item.name}</div>
        <div class="mc-price"><span class="mc-price-n">${Number(item.price).toLocaleString()}</span> IQD</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}
function fmcat(c,el){mCat=c;document.querySelectorAll('#menu-cats .cc').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');renderMenu();}

// ── POS ──
function renderPOS(){
  const x=t();
  const grid=document.getElementById('pos-grid');
  const cbar=document.getElementById('pos-cats');
  const filtered=pCat==='all'?items:items.filter(i=>i.category===pCat);
  const cs=cats(items);
  cbar.innerHTML=`<button class="cc ${pCat==='all'?'on':''}" onclick="fpcat('all',this)">${x.catAll}</button>`;
  cs.forEach(c=>{
    const b=document.createElement('button');
    b.className='cc'+(pCat===c?' on':'');b.textContent=c;
    b.onclick=function(){fpcat(c,this);};cbar.appendChild(b);
  });
  if(!filtered.length){
    grid.innerHTML=`<div style="grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:32px;color:rgba(232,212,160,.22);font-size:12px;">${items.length===0?x.noItemsAdmin:x.noItemsCat}</div>`;return;
  }
  grid.innerHTML=filtered.map((item,i)=>`
    <div class="pc" style="animation-delay:${i*.04}s" onclick="addCart(${item.id})">
      <div class="pc-img">${item.image?`<img src="${item.image}" alt="" loading="lazy">`:`<div class="pc-ph">☕</div>`}</div>
      <div class="pc-info">
        <div class="pc-name">${item.name}</div>
        <div class="pc-price">${Number(item.price).toLocaleString()} IQD</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}
function fpcat(c,el){pCat=c;document.querySelectorAll('#pos-cats .cc').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');renderPOS();}

// ── CART ──
function toggleCart(){document.getElementById('cart-sheet').classList.toggle('expanded');}
function addCart(id,e){
  if(e)e.stopPropagation();
  const item=items.find(i=>i.id===id);if(!item)return;
  const ex=cart.find(c=>c.id===id);
  if(ex)ex.qty++;else cart.push({id,name:item.name,price:item.price,image:item.image,qty:1});
  renderCart();
  document.getElementById('cart-sheet').classList.add('expanded');
}
function rmCart(id){
  const ex=cart.find(c=>c.id===id);if(!ex)return;
  if(ex.qty>1)ex.qty--;else cart=cart.filter(c=>c.id!==id);
  renderCart();
}
function clearCart(){cart=[];renderCart();}
function renderCart(){
  const x=t();
  const list=document.getElementById('cart-list');
  const btn=document.getElementById('chk-btn');
  const badge=document.getElementById('cart-badge');
  const total=cart.reduce((s,c)=>s+c.price*c.qty,0);
  const count=cart.reduce((s,c)=>s+c.qty,0);
  badge.textContent=count;
  document.getElementById('total-val').textContent=fp(total);
  if(!cart.length){
    list.innerHTML=`<div class="cart-empty-msg"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg><p>${x.cartEmptyMsg}</p></div>`;
    btn.disabled=true;return;
  }
  list.innerHTML=cart.map(c=>`
    <div class="ci">
      <div class="ci-img">${c.image?`<img src="${c.image}" alt="">`:`<div class="ci-ph">☕</div>`}</div>
      <div class="ci-info">
        <div class="ci-name">${c.name}</div>
        <div class="ci-price">${Number(c.price).toLocaleString()} IQD</div>
      </div>
      <div class="qty-ctrl">
        <button class="qb" onclick="rmCart(${c.id})">−</button>
        <span class="qv">${c.qty}</span>
        <button class="qb" onclick="addCart(${c.id})">+</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
  btn.disabled=false;
  btn.textContent=x.chkBtn;
}

// ── CHECKOUT ──
function checkout(){
  if(!cart.length)return;
  const x=t();
  const total=cart.reduce((s,c)=>s+c.price*c.qty,0);
  const table=document.getElementById('tableNum').value||'—';
  const type=document.getElementById('orderType').value;
  const now=new Date();
  document.getElementById('r-date').textContent=now.toLocaleDateString('en-GB')+' '+now.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  document.getElementById('r-info').textContent=type==='dine-in'?x.diLbl+' '+table:x.taLbl;
  document.getElementById('r-items').innerHTML=cart.map(c=>`
    <div class="ritem">
      <span class="ritem-qty">${c.qty}×</span>
      <span class="ritem-name">${c.name}</span>
      <span class="ritem-price">${Number(c.price*c.qty).toLocaleString()} IQD</span>
    </div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('r-total').textContent=fp(total);
  document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open');
}
function closeMo(){document.getElementById('mo').classList.remove('open');}
function newOrder(){
  closeMo();orders++;localStorage.setItem('lt_ord',orders);
  cart=[];renderCart();updateStats();
  document.getElementById('tableNum').value='';
  toast('✓ '+t().tOrder);
}

// ── ADMIN ──
function renderAdmin(){
  const x=t();
  const list=document.getElementById('items-list');
  document.getElementById('il-badge').textContent=items.length+' '+x.ilSuffix;
  if(!items.length){list.innerHTML=`<div class="no-items">${x.noItemsAdmin}</div>`;updateStats();return;}
  list.innerHTML=items.map((item,i)=>`
    <div class="ai" style="animation-delay:${i*.04}s">
      <div class="ai-img">${item.image?`<img src="${item.image}" alt="">`:`<div class="ai-ph">☕</div>`}</div>
      <div class="ai-info">
        <div class="ai-name">${item.name}</div>
        <div class="ai-meta">
          <span class="ai-cat">${item.category}</span>
          <span class="ai-price">${Number(item.price).toLocaleString()} IQD</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="ai-del" onclick="delItem(${item.id})">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6m4-6v6"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>`).join('');
  updateStats();
}
function updateStats(){
  document.getElementById('st-items').textContent=items.length;
  document.getElementById('st-cats').textContent=cats(items).length;
  document.getElementById('st-orders').textContent=orders;
}
function renderAll(){renderMenu();renderPOS();renderAdmin();renderCart();updateStats();}

// ── INIT ──
setLang(lang);
</script>
</body>
</html>
